(2) Cloned base strategy active-signal-v1 to active-signal-v1-integrated. (5-6) Saved version 2 with integrated signal logic. (7) Ran full-history backtest (run_id: 20260407-160324-ce7db3bf). CRITICAL FINDING: Integrated strategy produces IDENTICAL metrics to regime-gate-only strategy (388 trades, $1520.78 PnL, PF=1.494, Sharpe=1.385, MaxDD=3.08%), meaning cf_session_weakness_filter adds ZERO marginal filtering value on top of cf_regime_vol_gate. (8) Walk-forward started (job 20260407-160425-4b190f7f). (9) Condition stability queued (job cond-0acc6cf21a24). (10) Robustness bundle MCP timed out.
